description_long: This is a heavily modified, four-wheeled combat tactical vehicle with a digital camouflage paint scheme in shades of gray and green. The vehicle features reinforced, oversized off-road tires with deep treads, suitable for rugged urban environments. Mounted on the roof is a large, rust-colored turret equipped with a machine gun and additional weaponry, providing 360-degree coverage. The body appears to be armored, with thick, angular panels covering the doors, hood, and roof, and additional protective elements on the front and rear. The windows are small and likely reinforced, and the vehicle is equipped with various external mounts and racks for equipment. The overall design emphasizes durability, protection, and offensive capability for urban combat scenarios.
description: A camouflaged, armored tactical vehicle with a roof-mounted turret and oversized off-road tires, designed for urban combat. Features thick armor plating, reinforced windows, and multiple weapon mounts.
description_view_0: Side view showing the digital camouflage, large off-road tires, and the prominent roof-mounted turret with a machine gun.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the armored back, rear tire width, and the rear aspect of the turret and weapon mounts.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same camouflage, turret, and weapon mounts, with visible side armor and equipment racks.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the armored grill, front lights, reinforced bumper, and the forward-facing aspect of the turret.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large machine gun mount on the roof turret, with additional mounts for smaller arms on the roof and possibly the sides.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with thick, angular panels covering the doors, hood, roof, and rear. The armor appears reinforced and continuous, with no visible gaps.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Digital camouflage pattern in gray, green, and brown, with pixelated rectangular shapes covering the entire exterior.
attribute_tire_type: Four oversized off-road tires with deep, aggressive tread patterns, suitable for rough terrain and reinforced for durability.
